equivalence_argument: No complete mapping was found: the current pool explicitly rejects Fulfilled delivery submissions and reserves the Fulfilled -> AwaitingDelivery transition for canonical settlement processing.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing recovery path that accepts delivery while Fulfilled, releases the sender lock, transitions to AwaitingDelivery, stores delivery data, and then moves to DeliveryReady.
related_but_insufficient_code: submit_delivery_result_with_context returns InvalidState(Fulfilled) before storing delivery data.
mark_awaiting_delivery is the only code path that transitions Fulfilled to AwaitingDelivery and releases sender_locks after canonical settlement.
The test submit_delivery_result_rejects_fulfilled_before_awaiting_delivery codifies the opposite behavior.

rationale: The diff replaces a strict AwaitingDelivery-only check with a Fulfilled recovery branch that removes the sender from sender_index, logs a warning, sets AwaitingDelivery, then continues to store delivery data and set DeliveryReady. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: When submit_delivery_result is called for a long-running or ZK async transaction that is still in Fulfilled state, the async pool must release the sender lock, transition it to AwaitingDelivery as a recovery path, then store the delivery result/proof and move it to DeliveryReady instead of rejecting the delivery as an invalid state.
suggested_falsification_tests: Place a long-running async transaction in Fulfilled with an execution result and sender lock still present, call submit_delivery_result, and assert it succeeds, removes the sender lock, stores delivery_result and delivery_proof, and ends in DeliveryReady; assert a non-delivery-capable transaction in Fulfilled is still rejected.
summary: The missed-awaiting-transition recovery path is not present in current code.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Place a two-phase async entry in Fulfilled and call submit_delivery_result_with_context; current code should return InvalidState(Fulfilled), not recover to DeliveryReady.
title: Delivery submit recovers missed awaiting transition
